# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-application
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-application
        image: <your_web_application_image>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: <your_memcached_image>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: background-workers
        image: <your_background_workers_image>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
  - name: memcached
    port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: background-workers
spec:
  selector:
    app: background-workers
  ports:
  - name: background-workers
    port: 80
    targetPort: 80
